channel.title: Digital Campus - Release Notes
channel.description: Technology products managed by the Digital Campus team

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

item.title: 1Password - 1Password CLI

1Password

All Mac iOS

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Weekly Recap - July 17, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Credential Provider for Windows (GCPW) now supports FIDO2-compliant physical security keys as a second factor for authenticationGoogle Credential Provider for Windows (GCPW) has been updated to support FIDO2-compliant physical security keys as a second factor for authentication. This update...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - July 17, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - New Google Meet 'Take notes for me' settings for admins and end users
item.description:
Google Workspace

To help users remember to capture notes for meetings when it’s most valuable, we’re updating the admin and end user settings that let them pre-configure AI note-taking for Google Meet.Admin settingsPreviously, admins could only enable or disable automatic note-taking for all meetings. Today, we’re...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Cast yourself in AI video clips using your personal avatar with Gemini Omni in Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

Users now have access to Gemini Omni directly within Google Vids. With Gemini Omni, you can create videos using your personal avatar to scale your presence without the studio time. Use a secure verification process to capture your likeness and then select it as a character in Omni generations...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Generate higher quality AI video clips and edit any video with Gemini Omni in Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

Users now have access to Gemini Omni directly within Google Vids. Omni provides higher quality video generation with significant improvements over previous models. Additionally, Omni’s world understanding unlocks simple video edits so you can ask Omni to tweak the video you have to get the video...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Expanded language support for Gemini in Google Docs
item.description:
Google Workspace

Earlier this year, we introduced new Gemini in Google Docs capabilities that help you move from a blank page to a finished document faster than ever.We are now expanding support for these features to 11 more languages, including Mandarin, Dutch, Malay, Hebrew, Polish, Turkish, Czech, Indonesian,...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Easily control the emotions and pacing of AI avatars and AI voiceovers in Google Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

Users can now easily steer voiceover and avatar speaking in Google Vids by typing content within brackets like “[excitedly]”.When typing open brackets (“[“) Vids will offer a menu of steering tags to customize pacing, emotional delivery, and sound effects. These cues empower you to guide the...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - NotebookLM is now Gemini Notebook
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook. While it remains a standalone product focused on being your premier research tool, the new name reflects how it will evolve to do more across the Google ecosystem.Users will see the new name and updated logo roll out across different interfaces over the...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New response fields for Quote APIs
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New response fields for Quote APIs.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Return assigned user names for phone numbers
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added the `assigned_to_name` response field to the Phone Numbers APIs to return the name of the user or entity assigned to each phone number.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New external_storage_url field session.recording_completed webhook
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New external_storage_url field in the Cloud Recording session.recording_completed webhook event.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 2.6.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Support user failover status change. Add a pre-connection (two-step join) flow to speed up the actual session join. Joining or leaving a subsession now triggers the onSubSessionStatusChanged and onSessionLeave callbacks in useSdkEventListener.ts. Increase the command channel...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Now available: group conversations with external collaborators in Google Chat
item.description:
Google Workspace

For many teams, it’s essential to be able to work in real-time with partners from outside your organization. We’re improving external collaboration in Google Chat by making it possible to create group conversations that include external users.Previously, teams using Google Chat could only create...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Bolt for JS v5
item.description:
Slack

Version 5.0.0 of Bolt for JS is here! This release follows the Node Slack SDK's shift from axios to the native Fetch API, removes the deprecated Workflow Steps from Apps feature, and raises the minimum Node.js version to 20.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - New refinement capabilities allow custom editing with Help me write in Gmail
item.description:
Google Workspace

Users can now edit and revise their email drafts in Gmail via the prompt bar, using custom refine instructions in Help me write. Previously the refines were limited to preset options like Polish, Formalize, and Shorten. Now if your first draft isn’t quite perfect, you can provide a precise...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Improvement to in-room problem reporting for Google Meet hardware
item.description:
Google Workspace

Maintaining an enterprise-grade video conferencing environment requires visibility into the health of its devices. We're introducing new ways to see Google Meet hardware user-reported feedback directly in the Admin console.We’ve also updated user-side feedback options to replace generic reporting...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Multiple Node Slack SDK package updates
item.description:
Slack

Our collection of Node Slack SDK packages have received new major versions.

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 27.0 beta 3 v.2 (26A5378n)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Credential Provider for Windows (GCPW) now supports FIDO2-compliant physical security keys as a second factor for authentication
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Credential Provider for Windows (GCPW) has been updated to support FIDO2-compliant physical security keys as a second factor for authentication. This update helps organizations improve their security posture by enabling administrators to enforce 2-Step Verification (2SV) using hardware...

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 26.6 beta 5 (25G5065a)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The design_types field on Design responses and the design_type field on DesignPage are now out of preview and included in every response.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Desktop notifications now pull text from blocks first
item.description:
Slack

Slack desktop client notifications now pull text from blocks first, falling back to the top-level text field only if no text can be extracted from blocks. Mobile notifications continue to exclusively use message.text.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Add new request field to Contacts API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added `next_page_token' and `pronoun` request fields to the `GET /v2/contacts` API.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Get available times for schedules
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added an Available Times API to retrieve available time slots for a schedule.

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - July 10, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Weekly Recap - July 10, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Join video conferences on Google Meet hardware via SIP through PexipYou can now join video conferences on Google Meet hardware via SIP through a Pexip interop gateway. This brings universal connectivity for users to join meetings hosted on any SIP-compatible platform directly from their Meet rooms....

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Streamline identity lifecycle management in Google Workspace with new inbound SCIM support
item.description:
Google Workspace

We are excited to announce the general availability of Google Workspace inbound SCIM APIs to help IT administrators standardize identity lifecycle management. This new capability allows you to sync your Google Workspace directory in real time with any SCIM-compatible Identity Provider (IdP), HR...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - July 3, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New manifest tool for creating apps
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: new-feature | Manifests are JSON-formatted files that contain the configuration for Zoom Apps. With a manifest, you can use the Marketplace build flow or an API to create a general app with a predefined configuration or to adjust the configuration of an existing general app. Using the...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Convert your Google Slides to videos in 7 additional languages
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Vids already lets you convert your Slides content into Vids with AI-generated scripts, voiceovers, background music, and animations for presentations and accounts in English.We’re now expanding support to French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, and Spanish. Getting...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - New calendar sharing permission level and changes to recurring event visibility
item.description:
Google Workspace

We're introducing a new calendar sharing permission level: “Make changes (see private events as free/busy)”. This allows you to grant someone edit access to your calendar while keeping the details of your private events entirely hidden. This is especially useful for leaders who assign delegates to...

View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Turn any video into a Scribe
item.description:
Scribe
View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Pro Pro Team Enterprise Capturing
item.description:
Scribe
View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for July 6 2026
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have new releases today with builds across Beta and Experimental. New builds this week Today we are releasing new Windows 11 Insider Preview Builds. As a reminder, all Insiders can find the rel The post Announcing new builds for July 6 2026 appeared first on Windows...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - June Release Update
item.description:
Kuali Build

improvements We've now released Versions and Document History for all Build users. This makes Revisions function detailed below, as well as...

View release notes →

macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added Dashboard API endpoints for AI metrics.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - RTMS June release
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Add REST API support for starting RTMS for meeting participants, add chat message media data support with 5 new event types for meetings and webinars, updates to protocol definitions including new and updated enums, improve PSTN user identification for simultaneous participants.

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Propose Revisions to Completed Documents
item.description:
Kuali Build

You now have another way to update existing documents. In addition to editing a document directly or creating a new version, you can now pro...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Brain²: Release Notes Takeover
item.description:
ClickUp

Hey, Community!This week's ClickUpdates is a full Brain² takeover. Brain² self-improves, routes to the best models, and actually completes your work. It creates websites, builds slides, and manages projects while co-working with your entire team. Use every model you're used to, on every device, for...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Agent context has landed
item.description:
Slack

Agent apps can now receive context about what a user is currently viewing when they send a message. When a user has a channel, DM, thread, canvas, or list open and messages your app, Slack will pass that context automatically.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Warm transfer with Zoom Phone
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release, breaking-change | As of May 18th 2026, internal changes were made that require a new retrieval process for accessing warm transfer call data. The following sections outline the changes. Moving forward, make sure your systems use the appropriate implementation methods to ensure...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - June 26, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - 👋 Ask ClickUp's Head of AI anything about Brain² (Reddit AMA)
item.description:
ClickUp

Hey, everyone!Jay Hack, ClickUp's Head of AI, is hosting an AMA (Ask Me Anything) on Reddit all about Brain², the ground-up rebuild of ClickUp Brain.🗓️ When: Tuesday, July 7th, 9am–11am PT📍 Where: r/ClickUp on RedditBrain² isn't another chatbot. It's a context-aware AI coworker that understands...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - New preview APIs are available: Get design analytics, Get design analytics viewers, Get design analytics views over time, Get design analytics page vi
item.description:
Canva

New preview APIs are available: Get design analytics, Get design analytics viewers, Get design analytics views over time, Get design analytics page views, and Get design analytics links. These APIs let you retrieve engagement metrics for a design shared via Canva.

View release notes →

item.title: PaperCut - 26.0.2
item.description:
PaperCut

New Features SAML 2.0 Authentication This feature introduces SAML 2.0 for single-sign-on support (SSO), enabling PaperCut NG/MF to integrate with external Identity Providers (IdPs) such as Microsoft Entra ID, Okta, and Ping Federate. This allows System Administrators to provide a consistent login...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Introducing the Agent messaging experience
item.description:
Slack

Agents now support a new messaging experience, set by your app manifest:

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Python Slack SDK v3.43.0
item.description:
Slack

* We've added a public, read-only ts property to ChatStream and AsyncChatStream, enabling users to call the chat.update API method as a fallback when the server closes a stream due to undocumented timeouts.

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Slack CLI v4.4.0
item.description:
Slack

Version 4.4.0 of the Slack CLI is here!

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Version Types and Limit Editability
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now configure Version Types and Limit Editability to control how users interact with forms based on the type of version they're work...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - New Block Kit container block
item.description:
Slack

The container block is now available for Block Kit use.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New response and request fields for Accounts API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new fields to Accounts API.

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 26 June 2026, retail launch of new WIP improvements
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have new releases today with builds across Beta and Experimental, and are excited to begin rolling out the new Windows Insider experience to retail Windows 11 builds this week! New Windows Insider Program changes The post Announcing new builds for 26 June 2026, retail...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - You can now autofill a new design from an existing design that contains autofill data fields. The new Get design dataset API returns the data field na
item.description:
Canva

You can now autofill a new design from an existing design that contains autofill data fields. The new Get design dataset API returns the data field names and types for a design, and the Create design autofill job API now supports a create_from_design value for type that uses those fields to create...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Resubmit Withdrawn Documents
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now edit and resubmit withdrawn documents without starting over. Previously, withdrawing a document was a permanent action. If you n...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts video data values, letting you autofill an image data field with a video asset. Autofilling a video is
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts video data values, letting you autofill an image data field with a video asset. Autofilling a video is currently a preview feature.

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Scheduled Secondary Workflows
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now automate workflow actions based on dates, helping you send reminders, trigger integrations, and manage time-sensitive processes ...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Bridge the Linux Gap with NinjaOne 14.0: Seamlessly Discover, Deploy, and Support Every Endpoint
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 14.0 release expands on the platform’s unified experience, offering IT professionals unparalleled visibility and control across operating systems. These enhancements eliminate operational gaps with remote support, automated deployment, and data protection all in one interface. Explore...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - The best AI is your AI. Brain² is here.
item.description:
ClickUp

The best AI is Brain². Guaranteed.Brain² is your company AI that self-improves, routes to the best models, and actually completes your work - creating websites, building slides, and managing projects. It's multiplayer AI where human intelligence becomes your collective Brain.Your context. Already...

View release notes →

item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have new releases today with builds across Beta and Experimental, including Windows 11, version 26H2 for Experimental. Windows 11, version 26H2 Windows 11, version 26H2 represents our yearly second half The post Announcing new builds for 19 June 2026, version 26H2 for...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now accepts a type field to support future functionality for different autofill sources. The first supported value is create_from_brand_template, which is the existing functionality for creating new designs from a brand template. For backwards compatibility,...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 12 June 2026
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, We have a number of releases today with new builds across Beta, Experimental and Release Preview. Release notes for inbox Windows 11 apps Windows 11 inbox apps are now getting their own release notes sectio The post Announcing new builds for 12 June 2026 appeared first on...

View release notes →

item.description:

item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, This week we continue to expand the rollout of the new Windows Insider Program changes to devices in channels already announced. New builds this week Today we are releasing new Windows 11 Insider Preview B The post Announcing new builds for 29 May 2026 appeared first on...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Weekly Recap & Playlist Interrupt Release - 05.15.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

**Playlist Priority Scheduling: Interrupt and Override \| Take full control of what plays and when** When something urgent needs to go on screen immediately, you shouldn't have to fight your own playlist to get it there. Playlist Priority Scheduling lets you assign priority levels across your...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.04
item.description:
ClickUp

Gantt Baselines, Brain goes Mobile, ClickUp in ChatGPT, and More!This week's ClickUpdates brings Gantt Baselines to track how your project plans shift over time, the full power of Brain to your mobile device, ClickUp right inside ChatGPT, and more ways to customize how your meetings are captured.✨...

View release notes →

item.title: PaperCut - 25.0.11
item.description:
PaperCut

Important upgrade information Version 25 includes significant updates, which may introduce breaking changes, new internet connection requirements, and mandatory updates for some optional components.Upgrading from version 24.x? Please review Important points to know about PaperCut MF version...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.03
item.description:
ClickUp

Google Drive Automations, Granular Capacity in Workload View, and Smoother Teammate Onboarding!This week's release automates work between ClickUp and Google Drive, provides more detail into team capacity in Workload view, and lets you onboard invitees to teams faster.✨ Automate Workflows between...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Weekly Recap - 02.13.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Enhanced Proof of Play (POP) with **Hourly Reporting**, giving all customers more granular visibility into content performance throughout the day. - Improved Proof of Play to ensure reporting data...

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Product Recap - 01.12.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to over the break and last week week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - **Secrets API: Credential Management** — IT Admins can now securely manage the lifecycle of API credentials using a centralized Secrets API. This includes creating, listing,...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Release Recap - 12.05.2025
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🐞 Squashed Bugs - Fixed an issue where YouTube element showed an error due to recent changes in YouTube's Terms of Service. - Resolved a styling inheritance issue in Korbyt Create AI Layouts where elements did not...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Product Recap - 11.21.2025
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Added audio volume control for media in Korbyt Anywhere PWA, requested specifically to be used for Microsoft Teams Rooms use cases 🐞 Squashed Bugs - Fixed display issues in the NWS Weather Element...

View release notes →
